heading: Configure Workforce Identity Federation Authentication
body:
To create an OIDC identity provider using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas federatedAuthentication federationSettings identityProvider create oidc [displayName] [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas federatedAuthentication federationSettings identityProvider create oidc](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-federatedAuthentication-federationSettings-identityProvider-create-oidc).

codeBlocks.content: atlas federatedAuthentication federationSettings identityProvider create oidc [displayName] [options]
